title: peucedanum officinale subsp. stenocarpum
intro: Peucedanum officinale subsp. stenocarpum, also known as wild carrot or Queen Anne's lace, is a plant species within the carrot family Apiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and carminative effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Peucedanum officinale subsp. stenocarpum include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and provide antioxidant properties. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
